---
title: "About"
---

I'm a data scientist and statistical programmer. My work focuses on turning messy data into clear answers, building reproducible pipelines, and writing software that makes analysis easier for others.

I'm the author of **{ordinalsimr}**, an R package for simulating ordinal data that's now on CRAN. My background spans clinical research, epidemiology, programming, and more.

## Tools & Skills

**Languages:** R, Python, SQL, Go, HTML/CSS

**Areas:** Statistical modeling, simulation, data visualization, R package development, web scraping

## Contact & Links

- **GitHub:** [NeuroShepherd](https://github.com/NeuroShepherd)
- **ORCID:** [0000-0003-1769-7580](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-1769-7580)
